functions.name: list_sessions_v2
functions.description: List sessions with pre-aggregated summary data. Supports day_of_week filter so agent never has to calculate dates. Returns no_results with fuzzy suggestions if location not found.

user_id.description: User UUID from current_user_id session attribute. Always pass this when available.

date_range.description: Date range as YYYY-MM-DD,YYYY-MM-DD (start,end). Either side can be empty for open-ended ranges. Examples: 2026-01-01,2026-03-31 or 2026-06-01, or ,2026-03-31

location.description: Location filter - short keywords only e.g. denver not Denver Spring 2026

day_of_week.description: Filter by day of week: sunday, monday, tuesday, wednesday, thursday, friday, saturday

format.description: Filter by kind of event or reading (e.g. expo, fair, phone, in-person). Case-insensitive match.

functions.name: list_readings_v2
functions.description: List individual readings with full session context. Pass filters as JSON string. Returns no_results with fuzzy suggestions if location not found.

user_id.description: User UUID from current_user_id session attribute. Always pass this when available.

filters.description: JSON string with optional fields: start_date, end_date, location, payment, source, min_tip, max_tip, time_of_day

functions.name: get_session_details_v2
functions.description: Get complete session with all readings and summary stats in one call.

functions.name: get_user_summary_v2
functions.description: Get aggregate statistics for a user across all sessions. Returns totals, averages, and locations list.

user_id.description: User UUID from current_user_id session attribute. Always pass this when available.
